associatedMedia.description: Eilean Donan Castle is a small tidal island where three sea lochs meet Loch Duich, Loch Long, and Loch Alsh, Highlands, Scotand. https://pin.it/43Fh9OT

associatedMedia.headline: Eilean Donan Castle, Donan, Isle of Skye, Scotland
associatedMedia.description:
History
The name Eilean Donan, or island of Donan, is most probably called after the 6th century Irish Saint, Bishop Donan who came to Scotland around 580 AD. There are several churches dedicated to Donan in the area and it is likely that he formed a small cell or community on the island during the late 7th century.

zh.Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿吉爾阿爾哈坦
zh.Moidart, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭音巴內-爾莫達爾特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Morna MacDougall於1165年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，她的父親Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles22歲，母親Margaret Stuart of Moidart15歲。她於大約1185年與Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1230年在她的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾阿爾哈坦。

zh-hans.Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland: 苏格兰阿吉爾阿爾哈坦
zh-hans.Moidart, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 苏格兰音巴內-爾莫達爾特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Morna MacDougall于1165年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾时，她的父亲Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles22岁，母亲Margaret Stuart of Moidart15岁。她于大约1185年与Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1230年在她的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾阿爾哈坦。

nameMeanings.name: MacDougall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDougall
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Dubhghaill, ‘son of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was originally a byname used to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from the fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDowell and Doyle .

nameMeanings.name: Morna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Muirne, originally a byname meaning ‘beloved’; borne by Fingal's mother in the Ossianic poems of James Macpherson ( compare Malvina ).

variants.name: Myrna
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Muirne , now also used elsewhere in the English-speaking world. It is associated with the American film star  Myrna Loy  (  1905–93 ).

variants.name: Muirne
meanings: Traditional name, originally a byname meaning ‘beloved’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Morna MacDougall was born in 1165, in Argyll, Scotland, her father, Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles, was 22 and her mother, Margaret Stuart of Moidart, was 15. She married Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail about 1185, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1230, in her hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Morna MacDougall est née en 1165, à Argyll, Écosse, son père, Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stuart of Moidart, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail environ 1185, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1230, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Ardchattan, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Morna MacDougall 1165 in Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles 22 und ihre Mutter Margaret Stuart of Moidart 15. Sie hat um 1185 in Argyll, Scotland Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1230 im Alter von 65 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Morna MacDougall è nata il nel 1165 nel Argyll, Scotland, sua padre, Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Margaret Stuart of Moidart, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail circa 1185, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1230, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Morna MacDougallが1165年にスコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，父Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Islesは22歳，母Margaret Stuart of Moidartは15歳であった。約1185年にスコットランドアルグイルでKenneth MacKenneth of Kintailと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1230年に故郷で65歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルアルドチャッタンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Morna MacDougall(이)가 1165년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Stuart of Moidart(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1185년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1230년 그녀의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 아드차탠에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Morna MacDougall nasceu em 1165, em Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Stuart of Moidart, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail aproximadamente 1185, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1230, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Morna MacDougall родилась в 1165 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stuart of Moidart, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail около 1185 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1230 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности ардчаттань, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Morna MacDougall nació en 1165, en Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret Stuart of Moidart, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Kenneth MacKenneth of Kintail aproximadamente 1185, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1230, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland.
